connectOverlay.setKeyboardMode: ⚠ Set the drum to Keyboard mode before connecting

globalSettings.title: Global Settings
globalSettings.allowDoubleInputsDescription: Enable heavy trigger threshold for fast double hits

factoryReset.title: Factory Reset
factoryReset.description: Are you sure you want to reset all configuration settings to their default values? This action cannot be undone.

adcChannels.title: ADC Channel Mapping
adcChannels.description: Configure which ADC channels read each drum pad. Useful for older drums with different wiring.

drumKeyMapping.title: Drum Key Bindings
drumKeyMapping.listeningPrompt: Press any key to assign to {{padLabel}}...

interactiveKeyMapping.title: Key Mappings
interactiveKeyMapping.controllerBoardDescription: Click any green button on the board and press a key to assign it.
interactiveKeyMapping.listeningPrompt: Press any key to assign to {{buttonLabel}}...

backupRestore.title: Backup & Restore
backupRestore.exportingFromDevice: Fetching configuration from device — this may take a few seconds if a PS4 auth key is stored.
backupRestore.description: Export your current configuration to a JSON file, or import a previously saved config.

dialog.title: Import Configuration
dialog.descConfirm: Review what will happen before applying.
dialog.willReplacePads: Replace all pad thresholds, timing, and key mappings
dialog.willSaveImmediately: Save settings to the controller immediately
dialog.rebootWarning: The controller will reboot after importing the PS4 auth key. You will need to reconnect.
dialog.applyingWithPs4: Applying settings and uploading PS4 auth key...
dialog.rebootingDescription: The controller is rebooting to activate the PS4 auth key. Reconnect when it comes back online.
dialog.errorInvalidFile: Invalid config file: missing required fields.
dialog.errorReadFailed: Failed to read config file. Make sure it is a valid JSON backup.
dialog.errorImportFailed: Import failed. Check your connection and try again.
